name: Leah Zamir
description_short: Leah Zamir is a VP of Mortgage Lending at OriginPoint in Kirkland, WA, specializing in residential mortgages, VA loans, and investment property financing for borrowers nationwide.
description_long:
Leah Zamir is a mortgage originator and Vice President of Mortgage Lending at OriginPoint, based in Kirkland, Washington. With NMLS #830846, she has built a 10+ year track record in residential and commercial lending. Her professional background includes consistent recognition in the top 1% of mortgage originators nationwide, indicating significant volume and client satisfaction in a competitive industry.

Zamir's service portfolio spans residential mortgage origination (purchase and refinance), specialized lending programs for underserved borrower segments, and investment property financing. Her offerings include VA loans with 0% down payment options, FHA and USDA low-down-payment programs, bank statement loans for self-employed borrowers, jumbo loans for luxury properties, physician loans, foreign national loans, and DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio) loans for real estate investors. She also promotes rate-lock programs (Lock 'N' Roll for 60-90 days), same-day approval options with as little as 3% down, and down payment assistance guidance.

Zamir differentiates herself through explicit focus on non-traditional and underserved borrower segments: first-time homebuyers, VA/veteran borrowers, self-employed professionals, non-U.S. citizens, and real estate investors. She markets a relationship-based approach emphasizing personalized support, complex loan scenario expertise, and stress-free processes. She serves the Greater Seattle area (Greenlake, Ballard, Wallingford, Bellevue, Kirkland) and positions investment loan structuring as a wealth-building tool aligned with client financial goals.

Honest assessment: Zamir is a loan officer and mortgage originator, not a mortgage lender institution. Rates, terms, approval odds, and product availability depend on OriginPoint's underwriting and funding capacity, not her personal authority. Her top 1% claim is unverified and self-reported. The website includes affiliate product referrals (personal loans via Rate, Inc.) that may carry undisclosed revenue sharing. No independent reviews, complaint history, or third-party verification of credentials appear on the site.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Top 1% originator designation (10+ consecutive years) suggests consistent high performance and volume
Serves non-traditional borrowers explicitly: self-employed (bank statement loans), foreign nationals, physicians, and investors
Offers VA loans with 0% down and typically lower rates, with dedicated veteran outreach
DSCR investment loan structuring for real estate wealth-building, not just residential purchases
Multiple rate-lock and accelerated approval programs (Lock 'N' Roll, Same-Day) reduce rate risk during shopping
Covers diverse down-payment scenarios: 0% (VA), 3-5% (conventional, physician), assistance programs
Explicitly markets relationship-building and personalized support beyond transaction facilitation
cons: Leah Zamir is a loan officer (not the lender); actual terms, rates, and approval authority rest with OriginPoint LLC, whose underwriting standards and funding capacity are not disclosed
Top 1% claim is self-reported on her profile with no independent verification or supporting documentation
Website includes product referrals (personal loans via Rate, Inc.) with no transparent disclosure of affiliate compensation or revenue sharing
No independent reviews, complaint history, BBB rating, or third-party credential verification visible; relies entirely on self-promotion
Phone and email contact methods for a single loan officer create potential availability/responsiveness risk; no backup contact or team structure disclosed
best_for: First-time homebuyers in the Seattle area seeking personalized guidance through the mortgage process
VA and veteran borrowers seeking 0% down loans and specialized military lending expertise
Self-employed and non-traditional borrowers (bank statement applicants, foreign nationals, physicians) who face institutional loan denials
Real estate investors seeking DSCR loans and investment property financing for multi-property portfolios
diagnosis: Leah Zamir is best suited for borrowers in the Seattle area seeking personalized mortgage origination, especially first-time buyers, veterans, self-employed professionals, and real estate investors. The main caveat is that she is a loan officer, not a lender—approval, rates, and terms depend entirely on OriginPoint's underwriting and funding, and her top 1% designation is unverified self-promotion with no independent documentation or third-party oversight.
services: Residential mortgage origination (home purchase and refinance)
VA loans with 0% down payment and typically lower interest rates
FHA loans (low down payment, credit flexibility)
USDA loans (rural and suburban properties, 0-10% down)
Bank Statement loans for self-employed borrowers without tax returns or W-2s
Jumbo loans for luxury and high-value properties
Physician loans with paid mortgage insurance and 5% down options
Foreign National loans without SSN, green card, visa, or FICO score requirement
DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio) loans for investment properties
Down payment assistance guidance (federal and local grants and programs)
Rate Lock 'N' Roll program (60-90 day rate locks without signed contract)
Same-Day approval program with options as little as 3% down
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
